name: Quick Start Guide
description: Complete first-time setup through ClawDeckX visual interface — from install to first conversation in 5 minutes

content.body:
Complete your first-time setup through ClawDeckX's visual interface — no manual configuration file editing required.

**Prerequisites:**
- OpenClaw installed (`npm i -g openclaw` or use the install script)
- At least one AI provider API Key (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google)

After completion, you'll have an AI assistant that can chat through messaging channels.

steps.title: Start the Gateway
steps.description: Open ClawDeckX → Dashboard → Click "Start Gateway" button. If this is the first run, ClawDeckX will automatically detect OpenClaw installation and guide you through initialization.

steps.title: Add AI Provider
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Models → Click "Add Provider" button. Select provider type (OpenAI / Anthropic / Google etc.), enter API Key, and click "Test Connection" to confirm.

steps.title: Set Primary Model
steps.description: On the Config Center → Models page, find the Primary Model area and select a model from your added providers. Recommended starters: gpt-4o (OpenAI), claude-sonnet (Anthropic), or gemini-pro (Google).

steps.title: Add Messaging Channel
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Channels → Click "Add Channel". Select your platform (Telegram / Discord / WhatsApp / Slack etc.) and follow prompts to enter Bot Token or scan QR code.

steps.title: Set Agent Identity (Optional)
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Agents → Edit the default agent's IDENTITY.md and SOUL.md to define the AI assistant's personality and behavior. You can also choose from preset templates in Usage Wizard → Identity Setup.

steps.title: Run Diagnostic Verification
steps.description: Open Health Center → Click "Run Diagnostics". Confirm all critical items (gateway status, model connection, channel connection) show green. If any red/yellow items appear, click the corresponding "Fix" button or view details.

steps.title: Send Your First Message
steps.description: Send any message to your AI assistant in a connected messaging channel, or open ClawDeckX's built-in Chat window for direct conversation. Receiving a reply means setup is complete.
